codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review confirmed the final-hardening follow-up resolved both the live review point and the validator-blocking compile drift in one coherent packet: `ValidationSeedDataInitializer` now preserves existing tenant state codes during reseed, `RbacSynchronizationConfig` again exposes stable ordering for dependent startup runners, and focused initializer/auth tests were updated alongside the production code. The current milestone compile, gate-fast, and lint validators all passed with this fix on branch, so the feature passes on reachable commit `c4e30c64c72e243f24923eec61f53d8852ebf540` (`fix(validation): preserve reseed state codes and restore seeder order`).

summary: Pass. The final-hardening follow-up restores reseed state preservation and seeder ordering cleanly on commit `c4e30c64c72e243f24923eec61f53d8852ebf540`.
